0.text: Scattered ground-glass opacities in all segments of the left lung

1.text: Scarring at the apical level of both lungs

2.text: Consolidative changes in the peribronchial area of the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Scarring in the peribronchial area of the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

5.text: Subpleural 3 mm calcific nodule in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe
